title: New wind sounds but you can hear it(NWSBYCHI)
description: The new wind sounds in the snapshots are really quiet so this makes it bigger!
body:
### Hello annd welcome to NWSBYCHI 

_have you ever felt like these new wind sounds are too quiet?_

well NWSBYCHI fixes that!

NWSBYCHI supports versions 25w02a, 25w03a, 25w04a, 25w05a,25s06a,25w07a and 1.21.5!

NWSBYCHI also changes wind sounds (wind1.ogg wind2.ogg wind3.ogg wind4.ogg wind5.ogg wind6.ogg 
wind7.ogg wind8.ogg wind9.ogg wind10.ogg wind11.ogg and wind12.ogg)


##   explanation 

in 1.21.5 + standing next to sand for a random amount of time plays one of 12 ambience sounds which are so quiet you can hardly hear them! and this pack helps with that by making them 35% louder.

### Q/A

**Its too loud!**-->change the "ambience setting in sound settings in minecraft

**how do i use it?** --> go to Resource packs in Options then drag and drop the file

**Thats all if you have anymore questions dm me on discord (F0_olish)**
